# cirro Provider

Manage Cirro resources via the Cirro API.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    cirro = {
      source  = "cirro-bio/cirro"
      version = "~> 0.1"
    }
  }
}

provider "cirro" {
  base_url = "https://app.cirro.bio"
  # client_id     = "..."   # or set CIRRO_CLIENT_ID
  # client_secret = "..."   # or set CIRRO_CLIENT_SECRET (recommended)
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `base_url` (String) Cirro tenant base URL, e.g. https://app.cirro.bio. May also be set via CIRRO_BASE_URL.
- `client_id` (String) OAuth client ID. May also be set via CIRRO_CLIENT_ID.
- `client_secret` (String, Sensitive) OAuth client secret. May also be set via CIRRO_CLIENT_SECRET.
